User request: Plan a 2-day motorcycle trip from San Francisco to Yosemite National Park. Include scenic stops along the way and good overnight stopping points with motorcycle-friendly lodging.
prompts.response:
The trip should be 200 miles or less in distance.

## Step 1: Define the route parameters
Based on the requirements, we need to define the route parameters. We will start with the route name, which we will call "San Francisco to Yosemite".

## Step 2: Plan the route
We will plan the route by selecting the origin and destination points. We will choose San Francisco as the origin and Yosemite National Park as the destination.

## Step 3: Select the waypoints
We will select the waypoints for the trip. We will choose the most scenic stops along the way, which include the Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz Island, and the scenic route through the Napa Valley.

## Step 4: Calculate the distance and duration
We will calculate the distance and duration of the trip. We will choose the most scenic route with the least amount of traffic, which will be approximately 200 miles.

## Step 5: Plan the accommodations
We will plan the accommodations for the trip. We will choose the most motorcycle-friendly lodging options, which include the following:

* The Golden Gate Bridge Inn in San Francisco
* The Napa Valley Inn in Napa
* The Yosemite Valley Lodge in Yosemite National Park

## Step 6: Plan the route preferences
We will plan the route preferences for the trip. We will choose the route preference to be "scenic", which will allow us to take the most scenic route with the least amount of traffic.

## Step 7: Calculate the distance estimate
We will calculate the distance estimate for the trip. We will choose the distance estimate to be 200 miles.

## Step 8: Calculate the duration estimate
We will calculate the duration estimate for the trip. We will choose the duration estimate to be 2 days.

## Step 9: Plan the road quality
We will plan the road quality for the trip. We will choose the road quality to be "excellent", which will ensure that the road is in good condition and suitable for motorcycle travel.

## Step 10: Plan the traffic expectation
We will plan the traffic expectation for the trip. We will choose the traffic expectation to be "light", which will allow us to take the most scenic route with the least amount of traffic.

## Step 11: Plan the avoid highways
We will plan the avoid highways for the trip. We will choose the avoid highways to be "false", which will allow us to avoid highways and take the most scenic route.

## Step 12: Plan the scenic highlights
